column4: Then {{c1::Judah}} came near unto him, and said: ‘Oh my lord, let thy servant, I pray thee, speak a word in my lord’s ears, and let not thine anger burn against thy servant; for thou art even as Pharaoh.

So Joseph bought all the land of {{c1::Egypt}} for Pharaoh; for the Egyptians sold every man his field, because the famine was sore upon them; and the land became Pharaoh’s.
And as for the people, he removed them city by city, from one end of the border of {{c1::Egypt}} even to the other end thereof.
And as for the {{c1::people}}, he removed them city by city, from one end of the border of Egypt even to the other end thereof.
Only the land of the priests bought he not, for the priests had a portion from {{c1::Pharaoh}}, and did eat their portion which Pharaoh gave them; wherefore they sold not their land.
Only the land of the {{c1::priests}} bought he not, for the priests had a portion from Pharaoh, and did eat their portion which Pharaoh gave them; wherefore they sold not their land.
Then {{c1::Joseph}} said unto the people: ‘Behold, I have bought you this day and your land for Pharaoh. Lo, here is seed for you, and ye shall sow the land.
Then Joseph said unto the people: ‘{{c1::Behold}}, I have bought you this day and your land for Pharaoh. Lo, here is seed for you, and ye shall sow the land.

And it shall come to pass at the ingatherings, that ye shall give a fifth unto {{c1::Pharaoh}}, and four parts shall be your own, for seed of the field, and for your food, and for them of your households, and for food for your little ones.’

And they said: ‘{{c1::Thou}} hast saved our lives. Let us find favour in the sight of my lord, and we will be Pharaoh’s bondmen.’

And {{c1::Joseph}} made it a statute concerning the land of Egypt unto this day, that Pharaoh should have the fifth; only the land of the priests alone became not Pharaoh’s.
And Joseph made it a statute concerning the land of {{c1::Egypt}} unto this day, that Pharaoh should have the fifth; only the land of the priests alone became not Pharaoh’s.
And {{c1::Israel}} dwelt in the land of Egypt, in the land of Goshen; and they got them possessions therein, and were fruitful, and multiplied exceedingly.
